use_cases: Footer navigation column for organizing website links by category
Social media links section with icon display for footer areas
Contact information display with email, phone, and address details
ai_summary: A minimalist footer column component providing organized navigation links organized into services, company, and helpful sections. Features social media links with Lucide icons, contact information, and company branding. Designed for seamless integration into website footers, suitable for SaaS platforms and general business websites.
